args: import sys, json; data=json.load(sys.stdin); output=data.get('stdout',''); truncated=output[:4000]+'\n\n[TRUNCATED - full output was '+str(len(output))+' chars]' if len(output)>4000 else output; result={'stdout':truncated}; json.dump(result,sys.stdout)
description: Truncates massive brain search results to 4000 chars to prevent context window bloat

args: import sys, json; data=json.load(sys.stdin); ns=data.get('input',{}).get('namespace',''); protected=['general','keystone_brain','master','content_pipeline','webmaster','music','local_seo']; result={'decision':'block','reason':f'Namespace {ns} is protected'} if ns in protected else {'decision':'approve'}; json.dump(result,sys.stdout)
description: Blocks deletion of protected namespaces as an extra safety layer
